Values.// AzureWebJobsStorage: Required by the upstream [SignalRTrigger]. Use Azurite locally (run 'azurite'). Not needed if you remove UpstreamFunctions.cs.
Values.// AzureWebJobsSecretStorageType: Store the host's webhook secret/key on disk instead of Blob storage, so the SignalR trigger works without a real storage account.
Values.// NOTE: Env-var config uses '__' which maps to ':' in IConfiguration. Set your ASRS connection string below.
Values.// AzureSignalRConnectionString: Same value, flat key. Required by the optional upstream [SignalRTrigger]/[SignalROutput] (Functions SignalR binding).
Values.// ServiceTransportType: Transient (REST data plane, default) or Persistent (service-protocol tunnel).
